column2: Chevrolet Colorado (2023-Current) Pro Bed System
column3: This Pro Bed System is specifically designed to fit the Chevrolet Colorado load bed. This System provides the frame to customize your Load Bed storage configuration. Secures Pro Bed accessories, PBAC001, PBAC002 and a PBAC006 and is designed to mount a full Roof Rack and to haul more gear above it. Secures to the load bed of the Chevrolet Colorado with specific mounting brackets. Drilling is required to for fitment. Made of a combination of steel and aluminium, sealed in the same durable and corrosion resistant black powder-coating as Front Runner racks. The Pro Bed System have integrated hooks for more accessories such as the PBAC004. For further information on installation, please see the fitment instructions in the INSTALL tab.

column2: Fridge Slide and Cage Combo / Medium
column3: A Fridge Slide and Cage Combo / Medium that create a complete protective cove around your Dometic CFX3 55 / CFX5 55 Electric Cooler or Dometic CFX3 55IM / CFX5 55IM Electric Cooler*.  Mountable to any flat surface, such as the rear loading area of a SUV or pickup truck beds. The Fridge Cage has 3 (three) adjustable height settings to accommodate various makes of fridges. The Fridge Cage, when assembled on the lowest height setting, accommodates the full operations of the Dometic CFX3 55 / CFX5 55 Electric Cooler or Dometic CFX3 55IM / CFX5 55IM Electric Cooler*.  The Fridge Cage is designed with Molle pattern sides to mount smaller items directly onto the fridge cage. Includes 2 (two) sets of RRAC012 at the top of the fridge cage to strap down cargo, such as 2 (two) Wolf Pack Pro boxes with STRA034*. The slide-out extension gives you an additional 470mm/18.5'' x 325mm/12.8'' work surface and extend nearly 100% from the anchored base.   Slide mounting holes are predrilled. The Fridge Slide features a hold open mechanism to prevent the slider from closing when the vehicle is parked on uneven surfaces. A latching arm securely locks the sliding drawer in the closed position. Finished in the same durable weather-resistant black powder coating as the Front Runner Dometic Roof Racks. Four (4) STRA063 are included to secure your fridge to the fridge slide. Mounting hardware included for wood and metal surfaces.Note: The Fridge and Stratchits are not included when purchasing the Fridge Slide and Cage Combo / Medium. These products are sold separately.

column2: Pro Stainless Steel Camp Table Kit / Top Mount
column3: A complete TBRA015 and storage solution. This kit fits to the top of your Slimsport or Slimpro Roof Rack, in either N-S or E-W orientation. Safely store your TBRA015 above your rack. This bracket can be used in combination with other accessories to gain back space above your mounted table. Use in combination with RRAC360*.  RRAC360* adds two (2) SBOX031's* above your TBRA059. Use in combination with RRAC361*. RRAC361* secures 1 or 2 pairs of MAXTRAX MKII / Xtreme* or 1 or 2 pairs of Tred Pro* recovery boards. Use in combination with RRAC149*. RRAC149* is easily added with use of your TBRA015. Use in combination with RRAC314*. RRAC314* is easily added with use of your larger TBRA015. These brackets are made of high strength steel and sealed in the same black powder-coating as the roof rack. The RRAC134* offers a keyless solution for added security and peace of mind. (sold separately). TBRA059 can load two (2) x fully packed SBOX031's* or 1-2 pairs of recovery boards*.  Installation hardware is included. Note: *Additional accessories are sold separately.

column2: Easy-Out Awning / 2.5M / Black
column3: Quick and easy two-person set up in under 60 seconds. Mounts quickly and easily to the side of your Front Runner Roof Rack for instant sun or rain protection. Water-repellant, UV-resistant awning measures 2.5m/8.2 ft wide and extends 2.1m/6.9 ft from mounting extrusion. Lightweight, yet durable, vertical support poles have spikes on the end for secure ground placement and extend to 2.4m/7.9 ft maximum height for use with taller vehicles. Telescopic aluminum twist-lock upright and rafter poles as well as aluminum rafters that ensure rigidity. Includes reflective guidelines with tent stakes for stability in windy conditions. Durable, heavy-duty PVC coated 650g nylon cover protects your awning while stowed and in transit. Universal mounting hardware included. For best mounting results on Front Runner Racks, upgrade to the RRAC222 or RRAC029. Add additional sun/rain protection to the front or side with AWNI039 or AWNI040. Turn any awning into a fully walled room in minutes by adding the TENT037 or TENT039. Folds into the main carry bag which can be left permanently attached to the vehicle. Use the 3 mounting loops to secure the Front Runner 1.2 Light Strip LIGH179 to illuminate the space under the awning.
column5: Sporting Goods > Outdoor Recreation > Camping & Hiking
